name: io.github.Dan-Cleary/convalytics
description: Read-only analytics tools for AI assistants. Query top pages, top referrers, custom event counts, recent events, usage, and projects for your Convalytics account via MCP. Requires a Convalytics API token and an active Solo or Pro plan.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Convalytics API token. Create at https://convalytics.dev/tokens. Paste as 'Bearer cnv_...'.
